title: mirabilis multiflora var. glandulosa
intro: Mirabilis multiflora var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular four o'clock, is a flowering plant species within the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mirabilis multiflora var. glandulosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
